user_message: Before my call with Nod Publishers, prepare the forecast.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 16:19 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
Date: 2024-02-18 16:33 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Nod Publishers

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Samantha Singh <samantha.singh@nodpublisher.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-19 16:34 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Nod Publishers
Date: 2024-02-26
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on deployment blockers from our last session.

[00:08:00] Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers): Let me add some context -- we've been working on timeline constraints and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:13:00] Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us.

[00:17:00] Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:20:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:25:00] Samantha Singh (Nod Publishers): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:28:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.
